records.question: Which clubs have a coach named Joe Fabbri with rank at most 2 and match results showing exactly 20 gold, 8 bronze, and 9 small silver medals?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE coach.rank <= 2 AND match_result.gold = 20 AND coach.coach_name = 'Joe Fabbri' AND match_result.bronze = 8 AND match_result.small_silver = 9
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Club_ID
FROM club c
JOIN coach co ON c.Club_ID = co.Club_ID
JOIN player_coach pc ON c.Club_ID = pc.Club_ID
JOIN match_result mr ON c.Club_ID = mr.Club_ID
WHERE co.Coach_name = 'Joe Fabbri' AND co.Rank <= 2 AND mr.Gold = 20 AND mr.Bronze = 8 AND mr.Small_Silver = 9

records.question: Which clubs have match results with at least 6 gold?

WHERE match_result.gold >= 6
records.pred_sql:
SELECT club.club_id

records.question: Which clubs named 'AIK' have at least one coach and have at least one match result with gold exactly 20?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE club.club_name = 'AIK' AND match_result.gold = 20
records.pred_sql:
SELECT club.club_id
FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE club.club_name = 'AIK' AND match_result.gold = 20
GROUP BY club.club_id
HAVING COUNT(coach.coach_id) > 0 AND COUNT(match_result.rank) > 0

records.question: What clubs named AIK are in the USA region with a male coach named Jameson Tomas, having at most rank 1, exactly 20 gold medals, at least 9 small silver medals, and at least 168 points?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE club.region = 'USA' AND coach.coach_name = 'Jameson Tomas' AND match_result.rank <= 1 AND club.club_name = 'AIK' AND match_result.small_silver >= 9 AND coach.gender = 'M' AND match_result.gold = 20 AND match_result.points >= 168
records.pred_sql:
SELECT club.club_id
FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.Club_ID = coach.Club_ID
JOIN player_coach ON club.Club_ID = player_coach.Club_ID
JOIN match_result ON club.Club_ID = match_result.Club_ID
WHERE club.Club_name = 'AIK' 
  AND club.Region = 'USA' 
  AND coach.Coach_name = 'Jameson Tomas' 
  AND coach.Gender = 'Male' 
  AND coach.Rank <= 1 
  AND match_result.Gold = 20 
  AND match_result.Small_Silver >= 9 
  AND match_result.Points >= 168

JOIN player_coach ON coach.Coach_ID = player_coach.Coach_ID
JOIN match_result ON club.Club_ID = match_result.Club_ID
WHERE club.Club_name = 'Djurgårdens IF' AND club.Start_year <= 2005
  AND match_result.Bronze = 7 AND match_result.Big_Silver <= 9 AND match_result.Rank = 3

records.question: Which clubs have exactly 12 big silver, at least 10 small silver, and at least 89 points?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE match_result.big_silver = 12 AND match_result.small_silver >= 10 AND match_result.points >= 89

WHERE coach.gender = 'M'

JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
